Video.summary: Featuring Willie Mays' batting tips, Muhammad Ali, Sonny Liston, Joe Namath; the New York Jets win in Superbowl III, and more athletes.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Ed Sullivan Show: Sports Heroes
Video.title: Episode 1

Image.alt: Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1

Video.summary: Featuring some of the many athletes of color who broke barriers during a segregated time in the United States.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Ed Sullivan Show: Sports Heroes
Video.title: Episode 2

Episode 2
Episode 2
Episode 2

Video.summary: Ed Sullivan presents Rodney Dangerfiel "No Respect, Self-Loathing Home Life," Bert Lahr "Near-Sighted Doctor," Shecky Greene "Composers," Flip Wilson "Hecklers, Ray Charles, Troops."
Video.grandparentTitle: Comedy Legends from The Ed Sullivan Show

Video.summary: Ed Sullivan presents Rodney Dangerfield "No Respect from Wife and Kids," Jean Carroll "Daughter's Boyfriend," Alan King "Nuns, Jews, Family Reunions, and Nose Jobs," Des O'Connor "Broken Egg and Poetry."
Video.grandparentTitle: Comedy Legends from The Ed Sullivan Show

Rodney Dangerfield, Jean Carroll, Alan King, Des O'Connor

Video.summary: Clips and reminiscences show Sullivan and his 23-year variety series; host Burt Reynolds; the Beatles; Elvis Presley; the Rolling Stones; Tom Jones; Tina Turner; the Fifth Dimension; Harry Belafonte; the Byrds; Nat King Cole; Roy Orbison; Bob Hope.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
Video.title: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II

Image.alt: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
